prose:
Phenol Fukui reactivity indices were calculated using Density Functional Theory (DFT) at the B3LYP/def2-TZVP level (tier `standard`, density-fit) in PySCF, gas phase, with a charge of 0 and multiplicity of 1. The geometry was taken from the provided `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/phenol/phenol.xyz` file, and this was a single-point calculation.

The most electrophilic site is Carbon (atom 3) with an f+ value of 2.1028319.
The most nucleophilic site is Oxygen (atom 1) with an f- value of 0.16201477.

The calculation integrity status is "ok" and trustworthy.
